title: Red Crystal(红晶)
description: Add new recipes to facilitate players in making items.
body:
**_Intro_**:This datapack aims to add new formulas to facilitate players in making items and provide convenience for players.

**_简介_**:本数据包旨在添加新的配方，方便玩家制作物品，为玩家提供便利。


![Items that cannot be disassembled can be disassembled, and items that cannot be made can now be made.（不能拆解的物品可以被拆解，不可合成的物品现在可以制作出来了。）](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78785495aa828fa8deccc400413aabb351f924e0.png)

Items that cannot be disassembled can be disassembled, and items that cannot be made can now be made.（不能拆解的物品可以被拆解，不可合成的物品现在可以制作出来了。


![Other uses of the Nether Star...（下界之星的其他用途...）](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a26a19d9bb1f32a87e2e9921ef44c80b8afc9e1b.png)

Other uses of the Nether Star...（下界之星的其他用途...）


![Echo shard can now be obtained by disassembling other blocks.（回响碎片现在可以通过拆解其他方块获得。）](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b581c78a6b0a6d24e70d30342eff161589d87b75.png)

Echo shard can now be obtained by disassembling other blocks.（回响碎片现在可以通过拆解其他方块获得。）

![After disassembly, more useful things can be synthesized.（拆解后可以合成更有用的东西。）](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9f3648801fddf8a95a42f39b99df7a162bde636.png)

After disassembly, more useful things can be synthesized.（拆解后可以合成更有用的东西。）

![Books can be used to create ineffective enchanting books, which can then be transformed into experience bottle.（书本可以用来制作无效果的附魔书，而它又能转化为经验之瓶。）](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1211fd395e541156bb562216b5569b4a3c19ad4d.png)

Books can be used to create ineffective enchanting books, which can then be transformed into experience bottle.（书本可以用来制作无效果的附魔书，而它又能转化为经验之瓶。）

![The experience bottle can be used for the minerals you want to replicate.（经验之瓶可以用于你想要复制的矿物。）](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/747ca87ffe32789098d6e467770980f2bacbba57.png)

The experience bottle can be used for the minerals you want to replicate.（经验之瓶可以用于你想要复制的矿物。）

![Adding an extra experience bottle can double the replication effect.（多加一个经验之瓶就可以使复制效果翻倍。）](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8fcba8b22fd109f6b11e4ad3cdb675a3045241c_0.webp)

Adding an extra experience bottle can double the replication effect.（多加一个经验之瓶就可以使复制效果翻倍。）
